title: dev-server-for-e2e
command: cd /Users/xuyingzhou/Project/study-node-ts/xbrowser-marketplace && AUTH_SECRET_KEY=dev-secret FILE_SECRET_KEY=dev-file-secret ENABLE_DEV_TOKENS=true DB_DRIVER=sqlite DB_PATH=./data/app.db VITE_USE_MOCK_SERVER=true npm run dev 2>&1
